---
title: "mock_provider.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\intel\mock_provider.ts"
loc: 14
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.10
style_score: 3.40
intel_score: 4.86
overall_score: 5.82
---

## Intent
The `mock_provider.ts` module implements a synthetic intelligence provider for the PennyOne engine. It allows the system to generate rapid, deterministic 'Lore' for files without the overhead of live LLM sampling, primarily used during high-velocity development, visualization tests, and offline scenarios.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate by instantiating the `MockProvider` class and passing it to the `runScan` or `indexSector` functions. It satisfies the `IntelProvider` interface, ensuring seamless swap-ability with high-fidelity providers.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [FileData](file://../types.ts)
- [IntelProvider](file://./llm.ts)
- [*](file://node:path)

### Exports
- `code`
- `MockProvider`
- `fileName`
- `intent`
- `interaction`
